arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer not 100% certain to start Bayern Munich’s game vs Augsburg
arts.sum: At his pre-match press conference ahead of Bayern Munich’s game vs Augsburg, head coach Vincent Kompany gave an update on Bayern’s goalkeeping situation. Earlier in the week, Manuel Neuer cut…

arts.ttl: Injuries forcing Bayern Munich to innovate before tough games ahead
arts.sum: João Palhinha was injured while on duty with Portugal, likely ruling the midfielder out for the rest of the year, and goalkeeper Manuel Neuer is doubtful for Augsburg’s visit in the Bundesliga on Friday because of a rib injury. Bayern coach Vincent Kompany said on Thursday that Neuer felt a “stabbing pain,” the reason the 38-year-old goalkeeper was unable to finish Wednesday’s training session.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey: “Ligue 1 is tougher than the Bundesliga”
arts.sum: In an exclusive interview with Foot Mercato, Bayern Munich full-back Sacha Boey compares the Bundesliga with Ligue 1, French connections at FCB, and Vincent Kompany. It’s been almost one year…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. FC Augsburg: 2024/25 Bundesliga full coverage
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will host FC Augsburg on the new turf at the Allianz Arena in a match that should be very winnable for the home side. While you’re here, check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show for Bayern Munich vs.

arts.ttl: Juventus targeting Bayern Munich and Manchester United outcasts Eric Dier and Harry Maguire
arts.sum: Looking for some talk on the prospect of Bayern Munich teaming up Florian Wirtz and Jamal Musiala? Eric Dier has not had the easiest time with Bayern Munich, establishing himself under Thomas Tuchel but not Vincent Kompany who prefers Dayot Upamecano and Kim Min-jae.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid-Bayern set to start a transfer war
arts.sum: Real Madrid has its sights set on three Bayern Munich players: Alphonso Davies, Joshua Kimmich, and Jamal Musiala . Real Madrid sees Wirtz as the perfect successor to Luka Modric, but Bayern Munich is also keen on securing the young star, recognizing his potential to be Germany’s top talent for the next decade.

arts.ttl: The Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich TRANSFER WAR: Florian Wirtz leads group of FIVE players the European giants are fighting over - and one Man United target is in the middle of it all
arts.sum: That is the current situation, pitting two all-time powerhouses of European football against each other, according to reports, in one of the biggest tugs of war in transfer history.

arts.ttl: 'The beginning of the end' - Harry Kane's England future called into question by Man Utd icon
arts.sum: England opted to play without Harry Kane leading the line in the recent win over Greece and Paul Scholes claims we are witnessing the end of the striker's time with the Three Lions

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Sven Ulreich out until further notice
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s backup goalkeeper, Sven Ulreich, is perhaps one of the most reliable backup keepers a club can have. While you’re here, check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show for Bayern Munich vs.

arts.ttl: Malik Tillman was surprised, but not angry, at Bayern Munich’s refusal to bring him back from PSV
arts.sum: In the end, the Bavarian giants decided to not to exercise the latter option, allowing PSV to seal the permanent transfer of Tillman. Bayern Munich had loaned the American international out to PSV, inserting a €12 million buy option as well as an option to cancel the loan for a lower fee.
